---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Why would this help?**
How does this make Skill Sentry more useful for builders?

**Are you willing to help build it?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] No, but I'd test it
- [ ] Just an idea
